hooks.command: Set-Location 'C:\Users\amosd\Downloads\REWARD SCHEME'; $st = git status --porcelain 2>$null; if ($st) { git add -A; $mf = '.git\COMMIT_MSG.txt'; if (-not (Test-Path $mf)) { "auto: session update $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm')" | Out-File $mf -Encoding utf8 }; git commit -F $mf; git push origin main; Remove-Item $mf -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
